name: Wand of Choking Mist (Solid Fog)
description:
This blackened wood wand has a smoldering tip, emitting a slight trail of steam.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Solid Fog but the mist prevents creatures from being able to breathe in its area. They must hold their breath or start suffocating.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of Solid Fog.
